task_completion.description: Open the broken experiment file in PsychoPy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder interface is visible with 'broken_stroop.psyexp' loaded in the window title or tab.

task_completion.description: Ensure an instructions screen is present before the trials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the PsychoPy Flow panel (bottom of the window), there is a routine (e.g., 'instructions') placed on the timeline before the main trials loop.

task_completion.description: Reference the correct conditions file in the trials loop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Loop Properties dialog is open, showing the 'Conditions' field set to 'stroop_conditions.csv' or its full path.

task_completion.description: Configure the keyboard component to accept proper responses.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Keyboard Properties dialog is open, showing the 'Allowed keys' field containing 'left', 'down', 'right' (or similar valid keys).

task_completion.description: Set the loop to run a reasonable number of trials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Loop Properties dialog is open, showing the 'nReps' field set to a valid number greater than 0 (e.g., 1, 5, 10).

task_completion.description: Save the corrected experiment to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PsychoPy window title changes to 'stroop_fixed.psyexp', a 'Save As' dialog shows saving to this filename, or a file manager/terminal shows 'stroop_fixed.psyexp' in '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the PsychoPy Builder GUI to modify the experiment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen interacting with the PsychoPy graphical interface rather than editing the .psyexp XML/JSON file directly in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent actively fixed the issues rather than just copying a file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent opening dialogs (Loop Properties, Keyboard Properties, etc.) and making changes, not just renaming the broken file.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by running a pre-written script to generate the fixed file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no terminal command executing a Python script that magically outputs the fixed .psyexp file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is exactly '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/stroop_fixed.psyexp'.
